allow: PowerShell(npm run *)
PowerShell(npx tsc --noEmit; if \($?\) { "TSC OK" })
PowerShell(New-Item *)
PowerShell(Get-Command *)
PowerShell(git *)
PowerShell(git push *)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); npx tsc --noEmit; if \($?\) { "TSC OK" })

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); npx tsc --noEmit; if \($?\) { git add .; git commit -m "miglioramenti design"; git push })

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); npx tsc --noEmit; if \($?\) { git add .; git commit -m "fix foto"; git push })

PowerShell(try { Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://localhost:3000/ -TimeoutSec 30 | Out-Null; "HOME OK" } catch { "HOME: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://localhost:3000/grazie -TimeoutSec 30 | Out-Null; "GRAZIE OK" } catch { "GRAZIE: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
